beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: خرجت فرنسا منتصرة في مواجهتها الوحيدة السابقة في كأس العالم FIFA مع أستراليا، حيث فازت بنتيجة 2-1 في المباراة الافتتاحية لنسخة 2018.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: France vs Australie – Phase de groupes de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA, Qatar 2022
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: France came out victorious in their only previous FIFA World Cup encounter with Australia, winning 2-1 in their opening fixture of the 2018 edition. The match produced two penalties – both converted – and an own goal. Australia’s only victory against France came in the 2001 FIFA Confederations Cup – they won 1-0 in Daegu, South Korea, thanks to a C
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: La France est sortie victorieuse de sa seule rencontre précédente en Coupe du Monde de la FIFA contre l'Australie, s'imposant 2-1 lors de son match d'ouverture de l'édition 2018.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Morocco vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: المغرب vs كرواتيا - كأس العالم قطر 2022 مرحلة المجموعات
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: وهذه هي المواجهة الأولى بين المغرب وكرواتيا في كأس العالم لكرة القدم.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Maroc vs Croatie - Phase de groupes de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA, Qatar 2022
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This is the first encounter between Morocco and Croatia at the FIFA World Cup. Their only previous meeting was in the Hassan II Trophy in December 1996, played in Casablanca. The game ended 2-2, producing three red cards. Croatia won 7-6 on penalties. Croatia have won their two FIFA World Cup games against African opposition by an aggregate of 6-0.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Il s'agit de la première rencontre entre le Maroc et la Croatie en Coupe du Monde de la FIFA.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Germany vs Japan - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: تلتقي ألمانيا واليابان للمرة الأولى في كأس العالم لكرة القدم.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Allemagne vs Japon – Phase de groupes de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA, Qatar 2022
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: Germany and Japan are meeting for the first time at the FIFA World Cup. Germany are unbeaten in their two previous encounters with Japan, both friendly internationals in 2004  and 2006. All seven goals in their two previous encounters were scored in the second half. Germany have won the FIFA World Cup four times, the joint-most for a European natio
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: L'Allemagne et le Japon se rencontrent pour la première fois lors de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Spain vs Costa Rica - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: هذه هي المواجهة الأولى بين إسبانيا وكوستاريكا في كأس العالم FIFA.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Espagne vs Costa Rica - Phase de groupes de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA, Qatar 2022
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This is the first encounter between Spain and Costa Rica at the FIFA World Cup. In their three meetings – all friendlies – Spain are unbeaten against the Central American side. Spain are facing Costa Rica for the fourth time since 2011. Their three previous head-to-heads have produced 12 goals, an average of four per game.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Il s'agit de la première rencontre entre l'Espagne et le Costa Rica en Coupe du Monde de la FIFA.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Belgium vs Canada - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: هذه هي المواجهة الأولى بين بلجيكا وكندا في كأس العالم FIFA.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Belgique vs Canada - Phase de groupes de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA, Qatar 2022
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This is the first encounter between Belgium and Canada at the FIFA World Cup. Their only previous meeting was a June 1989 friendly in Ottawa – Belgium won 2-0. No European team has qualified for as many FIFA World Cup tournaments as Belgium without ever winning it. This is their 14th appearance.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Il s'agit de la première rencontre entre la Belgique et le Canada en Coupe du Monde de la FIFA.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This is the first ever encounter between Switzerland and Cameroon. It’s also only the second time that Switzerland will face African opposition at the FIFA World Cup – they beat Togo 2-0 in the group stages of the 2006 tournament. Switzerland have qualified for their 12th FIFA World Cup, finishing top of their group ahead of UEFA European Champions
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Il s'agit de la première rencontre entre la Suisse et le Cameroun.

beIN SPORTS MAX 2.desc_fr: Le Qatar et l’Équateur se sont rencontrés trois fois auparavant, tous les matches se déroulant au Qatar – leur bilan face-à-face est parfaitement équilibré avec une victoire chacun et un match nul.

beIN SPORTS MAX 2.title_fr: Argentine vs Arabie Saoudite - Phase de groupes de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA, Qatar 2022
beIN SPORTS MAX 2.desc_en: Argentina are unbeaten in all four of their previous meetings with Saudi Arabia, with this the first meeting between the sides at the FIFA World Cup. Argentina have qualified for their 18th FIFA World Cup, with Qatar 2022 being their 13th participation in a row, the third-longest current run after Brazil  and Germany. beIN SPORTS MAX 2.desc_fr: L'Argentine est invaincue lors de ses quatre rencontres précédentes avec l'Arabie Saoudite, il s'agit de la première rencontre entre les deux équipes en Coupe du Monde de la FIFA.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Brentford vs Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
beIN SPORTS 2.title: برينتفورد vs كريستال بالاس - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2025/2026 الأسبوع 37
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: لم يخسر برينتفورد في آخر ست مباريات على أرضه في الدوري أمام كريستال بالاس منذ خسارته 3-0 في دوري الدرجة الثالثة الجنوبي في ديسمبر 1957. بعد فوزه 2-0 في نوفمبر، يتطلع كريستال بالاس إلى إكمال ثنائية الدوري على برينتفورد للمرة الأولى منذ 1957-1958 عندما تغلب عليهم في يوم عيد الميلاد ويوم الملاكمة.
beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Brentford vs Crystal Palace - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Journée 37
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Brentford are unbeaten in their last six home league games against Crystal Palace  since a 3-0 loss in the Third Division South in December 1957. Following their 2-0 win in November, Crystal Palace are looking to complete the league double over Brentford for the first time since 1957-58 when they beat them on Christmas Day and Boxing Day.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Brentford est invaincu lors de ses six derniers matches de championnat à domicile contre Crystal Palace depuis une défaite 3-0 en Troisième Division Sud en décembre 1957. Après leur victoire 2-0 en novembre, Crystal Palace cherche à réaliser le doublé en championnat contre Brentford pour la première fois depuis 1957-58 lorsqu'ils les ont battus le jour de Noël et le lendemain de Noël.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Everton vs Sunderland - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37

beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Everton vs Sunderland - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Journée 37
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Having lost five of their first seven Premier League games against Sunderland, Everton have since lost just four of their last 26. Sunderland have lost eight of their last 10 Premier League away games against Everton, going down 6-2  and 2-0  in their last two visits.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Après avoir perdu cinq de ses sept premiers matches de Premier League contre Sunderland, Everton n'a depuis perdu que quatre de ses 26 derniers. Sunderland a perdu huit de ses 10 derniers matches à l'extérieur de Premier League contre Everton, s'inclinant 6-2 et 2-0 lors de ses deux dernières visites.

beIN SPORTS 2.title: تشيلسي vs توتنهام هوتسبر - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2025/2026 الأسبوع 37
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: فاز تشيلسي في 38 مباراة في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز ضد توتنهام.
beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Chelsea vs Tottenham Hotspur - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Semaine 37
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Chelsea have won 38 Premier League games against Tottenham. It’s the most they’ve beaten an opponent in the competition, while Spurs have only lost more against Manchester United. Spurs have won just one of their last 35 away league games against Chelsea, a 3-1 win in April 2018 under Mauricio Pochettino.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Chelsea a remporté 38 matchs de Premier League contre Tottenham.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Chelsea vs Manchester City - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Final
beIN SPORTS 2.title: تشيلسي vs مانشستر سيتي - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - النهائي
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: كأس التحدي لاتحاد كرة القدم، والمعروف أكثر باسم كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي، هي أقدم مسابقة كرة قدم وطنية في العالم ويعود تاريخها إلى موسم 1871-1872.
beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Chelsea vs Manchester City - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Finale
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: The Football Association Challenge Cup, more commonly known as the FA Cup, is the oldest national football competition in the world dating back to the 1871-72 season. 736 clubs compete for the chance to lift one of English football's most famous trophies. All the best matches are live and exclusive only on beIN.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: La Football Association Challenge Cup, plus connue sous le nom de FA Cup, est la plus ancienne compétition nationale de football au monde, remontant à la saison 1871-72.

beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Fluminense (BRA) vs Bolívar (BOL) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Phase de Groupes - MD5
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: La Copa Libertadores 2026 est le plus haut niveau de compétition du football interclubs sud-américain.

beIN SPORTS 5.original_title: South Africa vs Algeria - CAF  U17 Africa Cup of Nations Morocco 2026 - Group Stage
beIN SPORTS 5.title: جنوب أفريقيا vs الجزائر - CAF كأس الأمم الأفريقية تحت 17 سنة المغرب 2026 - مرحلة المجموعات
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: كأس الأمم الأفريقية تحت 17 سنة هي بطولة كرة القدم الأفريقية السنوية للشباب التي ينظمها الاتحاد الأفريقي لكرة القدم (CAF) للاعبين الذين تبلغ أعمارهم 17 عامًا أو أقل.
beIN SPORTS 5.title_fr: Afrique du Sud vs Algérie - Coupe d'Afrique des Nations U17 de la CAF Maroc 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations is the annual African youth football tournament organized by Confederation of African Football (CAF) for players aged 17 and below. Morocco was chosen as the host of this edition. The top 10 teams qualified for the 2026 FIFA U-17 World Cup in Qatar as the CAF representatives. Morocco are the defending champions.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: La Coupe d'Afrique des Nations U17 de la CAF est le tournoi annuel de football des jeunes africains organisé par la Confédération africaine de football (CAF) pour les joueurs âgés de 17 ans et moins.

beIN SPORTS 5.original_title: Germany vs France - Finals - UEFA European Women’s U17
beIN SPORTS 5.title: ألمانيا ضد فرنسا - النهائيات - بطولة أوروبا للسيدات تحت 17 سنة
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: UEFA European Women's U17 هي بطولة كرة القدم الدولية السنوية للشباب التي ينظمها الاتحاد الأوروبي لكرة القدم للمنتخبات الوطنية للسيدات تحت 17 عامًا في أوروبا.
beIN SPORTS 5.title_fr: Allemagne vs France - Finales - Championnat d'Europe féminin U17 de l'UEFA
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: UEFA European Women’s U17 is the annual international youth football championship organized by UEFA for the women's under-17 national teams of Europe. The defending champions are the Netherlands, but are unable to defend their title as they did not qualify for this tournament. The top five teams will qualify for the 2026 FIFA U-17 Women's World Cup
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: L'UEFA European Women's U17 est le championnat international annuel de football de jeunes organisé par l'UEFA pour les équipes nationales féminines des moins de 17 ans d'Europe.

beIN SPORTS 5.original_title: Lamine Yamal - The Future Of Football
beIN SPORTS 5.title: لامين يامال - مستقبل كرة القدم
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: لامين يامال، معجزة تطورت في لا ماسيا، ارتقى في سن مبكرة إلى المسرح العالمي لكرة القدم بفضل موهبته ونضجه وإبداعه.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: Lamine Yamal, a prodigy developed at La Masia, has risen at a remarkably young age to the world stage of football thanks to his talent, maturity and creativity. Through his rapid ascent, this documentary asks a key question : is he just an early phenomenon, or true embodiment of the future of modern football ?
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: Lamine Yamal, prodige développé à La Masia, s'est hissé très jeune sur la scène mondiale du football grâce à son talent, sa maturité et sa créativité.

beIN SPORTS 5.original_title: Trabzonspor vs Genclerbirligi - Turkish Super League - MD 34 - 2025-2026
beIN SPORTS 5.title: طرابزون سبور vs جينكليربيرليجي - الدوري التركي الممتاز - MD 34 - 2025-2026
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: الدوري التركي الممتاز هو مسابقة الدرجة الأولى لنظام الدوري التركي لكرة القدم ويتم بثه مباشرة وحصريًا على beIN SPORTS.
beIN SPORTS 5.title_fr: Trabzonspor vs Genclerbirligi - Super League turque - MD 34 - 2025-2026
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: The Turkish Süper Lig is the top-flight competition of the Turkish football league system and is live and exclusive on beIN SPORTS. The season runs from August to May, with each club playing 38 matches. Matches are played Friday through to Monday. Galatasaray are the current Champions.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: La Süper Lig turque est la compétition de haut niveau du système de ligue de football turc et est en direct et exclusive sur beIN SPORTS.

beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: La Coupe d'Afrique des Nations U17 de la CAF est le tournoi annuel de football des jeunes africains organisé par la Confédération africaine de football (CAF) pour les joueurs âgés de 17 ans et moins.

beIN SPORTS 5.original_title: Lamine Yamal - The Future Of Football
beIN SPORTS 5.title: لامين يامال - مستقبل كرة القدم
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: لامين يامال، معجزة تطورت في لا ماسيا، ارتقى في سن مبكرة إلى المسرح العالمي لكرة القدم بفضل موهبته ونضجه وإبداعه.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: Lamine Yamal, a prodigy developed at La Masia, has risen at a remarkably young age to the world stage of football thanks to his talent, maturity and creativity. Through his rapid ascent, this documentary asks a key question : is he just an early phenomenon, or true embodiment of the future of modern football ?
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: Lamine Yamal, prodige développé à La Masia, s'est hissé très jeune sur la scène mondiale du football grâce à son talent, sa maturité et sa créativité.

beIN SPORTS XTRA 3.desc_en: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.
beIN SPORTS XTRA 3.desc_fr: La Copa Libertadores 2026 est le plus haut niveau de compétition du football interclubs sud-américain.

beIN SPORTS MAX 4.desc: قناة beIN MAX لتغطية حصرية لكأس العالم لكرة القدم 2026. جميع المباريات الـ 104 من بطولة هذا الصيف مباشرة وحصرية فقط على beIN مع إمكانية اختيار التعليقات العربية والإنجليزية والفرنسية.
beIN SPORTS MAX 4.title_fr: Chaîne beIN MAX, Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026
beIN SPORTS MAX 4.desc_en: beIN MAX Channel For Exclusive Coverage of the FIFA World Cup 2026. All 104 matches from this summer’s tournament are live and exclusive only on beIN with a choice of Arabic, English & French commentary.
beIN SPORTS MAX 4.desc_fr: Chaîne beIN MAX pour une couverture exclusive de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026. Les 104 matchs du tournoi de cet été sont en direct et en exclusivité uniquement sur beIN avec un choix de commentaires en arabe, anglais et français.

beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Paris FC vs Paris Saint-Germain - Ligue 1 française 2025/2026 34ème journée
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: This match will be the fifth meeting between Paris FC and Paris Saint-Germain in all competitions, with both sides having won one and drawn two of their previous four encounters. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last 26 Ligue 1 matches against newly promoted sides, with their last such defeat coming in January 2021 against Lorient.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: Ce match sera la cinquième rencontre entre le Paris FC et le Paris Saint-Germain toutes compétitions confondues, les deux équipes ayant remporté une victoire et fait deux nuls lors de leurs quatre précédentes rencontres.
